Agent: Good morning, may I speak with Srinidhi?

Prospect: This is Srinidhi.

Agent: Hi Srinidhi, this is Jay Lewis calling from TGS Tech Info. How are you doing today?

Prospect: I’m good.

Agent: Glad to hear that. I understand you’re working as a Human Resources Administrator at Caledon Laboratories, correct?

Prospect: Yes, that’s correct.

Agent: Perfect. I’ll keep this brief I’m reaching out to share an independent HRIS comparison guide. It includes vendor comparisons, pricing insights, and buyer resources that can be useful for future reference.
I have your email as srinidhiravikrishnan@caledonlabs.com. Is that the best one to reach you?

Prospect: Yes, that’s correct.

Agent: Great, before I let you go, just wanted to understand when would your company typically explore or implement a new HRIS Solution? Would it be within 1 month, 1–2 months, 2–3 months, or 3–6 months?

Prospect: Yes, probably around four months.

Agent: Perfect, you’ll receive the email shortly from Software Finder, also, one of our representatives from Software Finder will follow up to ensure you received it and assist with any questions if needed.

Agent: Thank you for your time, Srinidhi. Have a great day!

Prospect: Thank you, goodbye.
